hero.headline:

hero.sub: Discover PICO educational kits — from microcontrollers to robots, everything you need to learn electronics and programming.

products.title: Our Products
products.sub: Educational kits designed for Moroccan high schools, universities, and makers.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.sub: Step-by-step guides to get started with every PICO product.

picoblocks.headline: PiCoBlocks
picoblocks.sub: A block-based programming environment designed to introduce coding from scratch, no prerequisites needed.

blocks.title: Block Programming
blocks.desc: Drag-and-drop interface inspired by Scratch, tailored for PICO devices.

arduino.title: Arduino Generation
arduino.desc: Every block program generates readable Arduino C++ code in real time.

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.desc: Desktop app for Windows/Mac/Linux — works without internet in the classroom.

upload.title: Direct Upload
upload.desc: One-click upload to PiCoBlocks, UnoCore, and PiCoBOT.

contact.title: Equip Your Institution
contact.sub: Teacher pricing, class kits, bulk orders — get in touch.
